title: Lilly and Ascidian Sign $1.9B RNA Exon Editing Deal for Kidney Diseases
headline: Eli Lilly strikes a collaboration with Ascidian Therapeutics worth up to $1.9 billion to develop RNA exon editing therapeutics for genetic kidney diseases.
key_facts: Deal value: up to $1.9 billion Technology: RNA exon editing Therapeutic focus: genetic kidney diseases

title: Regeneron Doubles Down on CytomX After Other Pharmas Walk Away
headline: Regeneron deepens its commitment to CytomX Therapeutics after other pharmaceutical partners exited the collaboration.
key_facts: Specific financial terms not fully retrieved from paywalled Endpoints article Described as Regeneron "doubling down" while unnamed other pharmas walked away Timestamped ~8 hours ago on June 3

title: Alnylam Signs First AI Discovery Deal with Inceptive
headline: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals signs its first AI-powered drug discovery deal with RNA specialist Inceptive.
key_facts: Described as Alnylam's first AI discovery partnership Inceptive specializes in RNA Timestamped ~3 hours ago on June 3

title: Axsome Pushes Back Generic Entry for Narcolepsy Drug Until 2040
headline: Axsome Therapeutics extends patent protection on its narcolepsy drug Sunosi, blocking generic entry until 2040.
key_facts: Generic entry delayed until 2040 Drug: Sunosi (narcolepsy/excessive daytime sleepiness) Axsome stock noted at +3.69% in Motley Fool screener (may be from different day)

title: Lilly and Boehringer Slash German Investment by $1B+ Each
headline: Eli Lilly and Boehringer Ingelheim each cut planned investments in Germany by at least $1 billion in response to a German healthcare reform initiative.
key_facts: Each company cutting at least $1 billion in German investment Cause: German healthcare reform initiative Author: Kevin Dunleavy; timestamped June 3, 2026 3:10pm

title: House Bill (COINS Act) Targets China Biotech Deals
headline: Bipartisan group of U.S.
key_facts: Bill adds biotechnology to existing COINS Act Follows recent deals involving Pfizer and Bristol Myers Squibb with Chinese companies Framed around national security concerns over China's drugmaking progress

title: Bristol Myers Squibb Focuses on AI Costs After Broad Rollout
headline: BMS shifts attention to managing the costs of its company-wide AI deployment after completing broad rollout to employees.
key_facts: AI rollout described as "broad" across workforce Now focusing on cost management Timestamped ~5 hours ago, June 3

title: Mineralys Makes Financial Moves Ahead of Hypertension Approval
headline: Mineralys Therapeutics executes financing ahead of an anticipated FDA approval for its hypertension drug.
key_facts: Specific financing terms behind paywall Described as pre-approval financial positioning Timestamped ~9 hours ago, June 3

title: Gilead Expands CAR-T Access via Cencora Deal

key_facts: Drugs: Yescarta, Tecartus (CAR-T therapies) Partner: Cencora (formerly AmerisourceBergen) Timestamped June 3, 2026 11:11am
